UpdateIpv6GatewaySpeedLimitPolicy.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string up to 64 characters in length. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
UpdateIpv6GatewaySpeedLimitPolicy.gatewayId: The ID of the IPv6 gateway
UpdateIpv6GatewaySpeedLimitPolicy.rateLimitRuleId: The ID of the rate limit policy
UpdateIpv6GatewaySpeedLimitPolicy.ingressBandwidthInMbps: The inbound bandwidth of the rate limit policy
UpdateIpv6GatewaySpeedLimitPolicy.egressBandwidthInMbps: The outbound bandwidth of the rate limit policy
